title: SDK Conformance Test
description: Schema for cross-language SDK conformance tests

mode.description: Execution mode. 'mock' (default) registers MSW handlers and asserts SDK behavior offline. 'live' dispatches against a real Basecamp backend, captures raw wire bytes, and validates against the OpenAPI response schema.

description.description: Detailed description of what this test verifies

operation.description: Runner dispatch/scenario key. Usually an OpenAPI operation ID (e.g., ListProjects, GetTodo), but synthetic keys exist for SDK-surface scenarios that are not wire operations (e.g., EditTodo drives the SDK's edit closure, UpdateTodo the merge-safe update)

method.description: HTTP method for the operation's wire request. Runners enforce it against the first captured request as an implicit invariant unless the case carries explicit requestMethod assertions (multi-hop scenarios describe their full wire sequence with indexed requestMethod assertions instead)

pathParams.description: Path parameter values for URL substitution

mockResponses.description: Sequence of mock responses for retry/error testing

path.description: JSONPath or dot-notation path for nested value assertions. For requestBody / requestBodyAbsent, the key (dot-notation) inside the captured request body.

index.description: Request index for per-request assertions: headerPresent / headerAbsent / headerInjected / requestPath / requestMethod / requestBody / requestBodyAbsent (0-based; negative values index from the end, e.g. -1 = last request). Default 0.

configOverrides.description: Override client configuration for this test case (e.g., non-localhost baseUrl for HTTPS enforcement)

baseUrl.description: Override the base URL used to construct the SDK client

maxPages.description: Override the pagination safety cap (maximum number of pages to follow)

maxItems.description: Override the maximum number of items to fetch across all pages

liveAssertions.description: Assertions evaluated when mode=live, against the raw wire response (not SDK-decoded structures).

type.description: liveCallSucceeds: dispatch returns without throwing, HTTP 2xx, JSON parses. liveResponseFieldsRequired: dotted paths that must be structurally present (per spec @required). liveResponseFieldsExpected: dotted paths that should be present; missing logs a warning, never fails. liveSchemaValidate: validate the raw wire body against the OpenAPI response schema for the operation.

fields.description: Dotted-path fields for liveResponseFieldsRequired / liveResponseFieldsExpected. Empty arrays count as present.

enabled.description: Set false to disable a default-on assertion such as liveSchemaValidate.

fixtureIds.description: Placeholder names referenced in pathParams/queryParams for live tests (e.g., PROJECT_ID, TODOLIST_ID). Resolved per the fixture-ID ladder: explicit env var → generic env var → discovery → skip.

pairwiseAssertions.description: RETIRED and rejected. The pairwise BC4↔BC5 compare engine (scripts/compare-canary-runs.sh) was removed when BC5 replaced BC4 in production — there is no live BC4 backend to compare against; see COORDINATION.md. This property is explicitly disallowed so a fixture cannot declare pairwise rules that would validate but silently never run (nothing enforces them anymore). Recoverable from git history (PR #308) if a reachable legacy backend ever warrants restoring the engine and this definition.

tags.description: Tags for filtering tests (e.g., retry, pagination, idempotent)
